action.reasoning: Observation: TTA + Ensemble in Iteration 7 dropped accuracy to 0.8051, meaning the standard EMA model from Iteration 6 (0.8119) is our best single model. Analysis: We have ~46 minutes left. We can use our highly accurate models (`best.pt` and `best_ema.pt`) to generate pseudo-labels and filter the training set. By keeping samples where the ensemble is highly confident (>80%) or agrees with the noisy label, we create a high-quality, relabeled dataset. Decision: Implement this pseudo-labeling strategy and train a new ConvNeXt-Tiny model for 18 epochs on the cleaned dataset. This should take ~30 minutes and potentially surpass the 0.8119 baseline.
